creator: ek@purplehat.org
text:
Hi Chris,

	I tried a few different variants of the SHAREOWN and SHAREGRP which
did, in fact, work using 'make install'. However, after running a 'make
package' and then a 'pkg_add pkgname.tbz' while testing, pkg_add did
*NOT* preserve the ownership. Perhaps only the newer "pkgng" style uses
COPYTREE_SHARE? So, what about the people that aren't using that (yet)?

	Attached is another shar file which only utilizes the SHAREOWN and
SHAREGRP (Removed pkg-install, SUB_LIST and post-install line). Does
this work for you when testing pkg_add? If so, I'm stumped as to why it
won't for me.

	Thanks for the feedback and help. It's always greatly appreciated!

Regards,
Janky Jay, III
